title: Per-model engine routing (hybrid local + cloud)
description: Run image generation on the LOCAL engine and video generation on the CLOUD Pod within ONE project, with automatic asset handoff (image -> image-to-video) and no manual ferrying. Depends on MPI-64 (RunPod Remote Engine) shipping as a solid binary local<->cloud switch first. Replaces today's single global remote-mode flag with a per-generation engine resolver, keyed initially by model mediaType (video->cloud, image->local) with optional per-model override later. Two-instance approach was considered and REJECTED: it splits the project across two app instances (project.json cannot be safely shared by two server processes), which kills the in-project image->video handoff that is the whole point. See research/hybrid-engine-routing.md.
